title: v28 T1: Alertmanager latency channel (pillar L14 Cycle 18)
author: forge
notes: Closes 71-pillar L14 Cycle 18. Implements Alertmanager receiver + route for latency-p99 SLO alerts. PagerDuty routing key defaults to khPants/core, overridable via ARGOCD_APP env. Dashboard annotation fires from ALERTS{alertname=~".*latency.*p99.*$"}.

tasks.title: Create alerts/alertmanager.yaml with PagerDuty receiver + latency-p99 route
Create dashboards/latency-p99.json with alert annotation overlay
Push branch feat/v28-T1-alert-channel-2026-06-25 and open PR
Write worklog to worklogs/ in v2.1 schema

refs.ARGOCD_APP: PagerDuty routing key env var (default: khPants/core)
